chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. S- 363 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.6.2014 1. For orders on MA 6869/14 2. For orders on office objection 3. For katcha peshi Mr. Mushtaq Ali Tagar advocate for petitioners 1. Urgent application granted 2. Deferred. 3. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that an FIR No. 74 of 2014 is registered at police station Kumb district Khairpur against petitioner No.2 and his relations who have been nominated in the above FIR. Petitioner No.1 present in court states that she has not been abducted by petitioner No.2 or his relations and has affirmed that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 on account of her own free will and accord. Since the petitioner No.1 present in court has categorically stated that she has not been abducted away by the petitioner No.2 or his relations. No arrest shall be made in the above FIR till next date of hearing. Meanwhile notice be issued to I.O of above FIR to record the statement of the abductee and in view of such statement proceed further in the matter. At this juncture learned counsel submits that the petitioners have danger to their lives at the hands of private respondents who have surrounded the premises of this court. Learned A.A.G. is directed to call the concerned police and ensure that the petitioners are reached safely to their abode. JUDGE k/-
